intent: First 2-STOREY 3BR smoke test — wide rear-sideways-stair, distributed baths, canonical 12x10 lot, no carport. 8x6 envelope per floor (48 m² footprint, 96 m² gross — mid-band for 3BR/2-bath 80-120 m²). Exercises three bedrooms on one upper floor: master + br2 street-facing at the front, br3 at the rear, and the landing hall as a compact mid-band CORE with all five doors radiating from it (three bedrooms, bath, stair arrival) — plus the sideways stair run, full-width front great room with dining counter, and the upper bath near the GF wet bay.
must_haves: master and second bedroom street-facing at the front
compact hall-core upstairs, not a long corridor
sideways stair along the rear band
full-width great room across the front with dining counter
